description_long: This is a standard Spalding basketball, featuring a classic orange-brown pebbled leather or composite surface with deep black seams dividing the ball into eight panels. The ball displays the Spalding brand logo prominently in bold white and black lettering, along with the NBA logo and 'INDOOR/OUTDOOR' text, indicating its versatility for different playing environments. The surface has a slightly matte, grippy finish, designed to enhance handling and control during play. The seams are recessed and well-defined, providing tactile feedback for dribbling and shooting. There are no visible signs of wear, scuff marks, or graffiti, and the ball appears clean and well-maintained. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the provided views.
description: A clean, orange-brown Spalding basketball with black seams, NBA branding, and a grippy, pebbled surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing a partial Spalding logo and two prominent black seams running vertically.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible logos, highlighting the pebbled texture and two horizontal seams.
description_view_2: Rear view with a partial logo visible on the right and two vertical seams.
description_view_3: Full frontal view displaying the complete Spalding logo, NBA branding, and all major seams.
attribute_brand_logo: Spalding logo in white and black, located on the front panel along with the NBA logo and 'INDOOR/OUTDOOR' text.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with deep black seams forming traditional basketball grooves.
